{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032402052360BF33A1B8FABCD62197"}"},"total":2682},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7535814137537086233","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"情节走向很新颖，不同于之前常看的游戏降临现世，可以当做游戏小说，也可以当作一本玄幻修武小说。有燃点有泪点，主角同境无敌，很爽。人族整体比较团结，反派大部分有脑子。
文笔也很不错，程度正好，没有过于华丽
但是对女角色的塑造大多集中在身材描述，和走剧情时的文笔风格相差很大。有一个剧情令人很不理解：主角一对多打异族时，把女性敌人绑起来送给别人生孩子？！这不是日本人做派吗[尬笑]","text_exts":[{"e":20,"s":16,"text":"游戏降临","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E9%99%8D%E4%B8%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774289123BCD62197%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227535814137537086233%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227233002744267672631%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E9%99%8D%E4%B8%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754571732,"group_id":"7233002744267672631","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0WhY0S5lE6oWQn7UKwndfJSVgVWNmJDAds+eG6MToyM","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1286855130614269","user_name":"爱吃葱爆兔肉的骆大夫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1286855130614269","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7233002744267672631","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一本东方玄幻类网游文。
没有重生，没有降临现实。
只有古老的华夏王朝，妖魔鬼怪横行的乱世，江湖、庙堂、群雄、世家。
神秘的武法与道术，摧城断江，移山搬海……
斩妖除魔，行侠仗义，策马扬鞭，快意恩仇！
这是赋予人新生的第二世界，我们将它称为——往界。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/894eda19550bee06bb88070d1a7c976d","author":"李庄白肉","author_id":"","book_id":"7233002744267672631","book_name":"网游：刀化人间惊鸿客","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7233205110199812666","read_count":"38348","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4532751"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1351","tags":"游戏体育,系统,网游","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/03a8820db22a2f6f77a0fab0d9b7f187~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779473123&x-signature=YPxcSVvJXhYiDp6gRgeejT0Fpgs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"96103268421","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"445"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032402052360BF33A1B8FABCD62197"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读142小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":511914,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":15277},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7502878748200354622","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了快三百章了，写的确实非常不错，可能是作者第一本书吧，文笔方面确实有一点点欠缺，但大纲和剧情我认为在🍅中已经是上上品了。角色塑造也非常好：闻人雄、州牧和一下剧情NPC，情感真情流露。但我觉得其实在题材上稍微有点冲突：作者大大说是一款存网游作品，但主角在体验服的能力中感觉就已经超出游戏公司正常管理的范围了（而且但这段后主角和其他玩家的差距有点太大了，不是很符合一款游戏的设定）
个人认为在题材上如果是一个普通的但不带什么系统金手指之类的穿越文，或者就是一个奇幻武侠文，做成一个比较纯粹的主世界作品会不会更好更能出圈（参考：烟雨楼）
当然这只是我个人觉得，或许有些设定在后面会有其他的剧情线（三百章左右的评价🙏🏻）
只是一个1000+小时读者的一下感觉，真的觉得这个题材和剧情结合非常不错（又不同看法的朋友阔以交流交流，要骂我的别骂太狠哈哈哈哈）","text_exts":[{"e":266,"s":263,"text":"烟雨楼","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%83%9F%E9%9B%A8%E6%A5%BC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774289123BCD62197%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227502878748200354622%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227233002744267672631%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%83%9F%E9%9B%A8%E6%A5%BC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746907613,"group_id":"7233002744267672631","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwkUth0/UXcN0rLiHYrEs5UQlpY0R6wTtw1LoGqr8hby","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/605dd1404fd943ebb7db670f027a4df1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879908&x-signature=nOMNAs3zlRJ%2BL5oMHAwERSYH%2FdI%3D","user_id":"1583718318473960","user_name":"ast1717"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1583718318473960","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7233002744267672631","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一本东方玄幻类网游文。
没有重生，没有降临现实。
只有古老的华夏王朝，妖魔鬼怪横行的乱世，江湖、庙堂、群雄、世家。
神秘的武法与道术，摧城断江，移山搬海……
斩妖除魔，行侠仗义，策马扬鞭，快意恩仇！
这是赋予人新生的第二世界，我们将它称为——往界。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/894eda19550bee06bb88070d1a7c976d","author":"李庄白肉","author_id":"","book_id":"7233002744267672631","book_name":"网游：刀化人间惊鸿客","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7233205110199812666","read_count":"38348","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4532751"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1351","tags":"游戏体育,系统,网游","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/03a8820db22a2f6f77a0fab0d9b7f187~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779473123&x-signature=YPxcSVvJXhYiDp6gRgeejT0Fpgs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"96103268421","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"469"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032402052360BF33A1B8FABCD62197"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":58102,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":115932,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":16610},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7256478231658038068","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"独树一帜的风格！静下心来看完开头几章后就会慢慢沉浸在这个不一样的第二人生故事当中，越看越上头。背景故事宏大徐徐展开，日常描写也恰到好处，精彩情节看的热血沸腾。间中看到作者说好像作者对本书信心不太足，在此希望能给作者加油，希望作者能好好打磨这个第二人生的故事，是金子总会发光的，加油！[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689530952,"group_id":"7233002744267672631","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7MA0X0IQGcSsIjSFu9aFPE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/45994ab479634d6c82841beac970304c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877916&x-signature=OLJ7sax5x5dKEl2muH9PN2ih0tk%3D","user_id":"356720239190472","user_name":"陈二狗zzz"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"356720239190472","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7233002744267672631","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一本东方玄幻类网游文。
